updates.title: Email sending fix (new mail provider support)
updates.notes: Fixes email sending when using a modern SMTP provider (like Resend) where the SMTP username is not an email address — the app now always sends from your configured Send-as address. The Send-as field in Email settings now applies to both Microsoft 365 and Other SMTP. Recommended: switch Email settings to Other SMTP with smtp.resend.com to restore reliable sending.

updates.title: Auto-sync + richer chats
updates.notes: Your data now syncs to the cloud automatically — immediately when the app opens and within seconds of every change you make (no more waiting for the background timer). Chats get friendlier too: every conversation — private learner chats, class group chats and your business inbox — now has an emoji picker 😊 and file attachments 📎 (up to 10 MB). Learners can send files back to you as well; every file is private to its conversation.

updates.title: Update installer reliability fix
updates.notes: Fixes the auto-updater crashing with a JavaScript error (spawn EBUSY) when your antivirus was still scanning the freshly downloaded installer — the updater now waits for the scan to finish and retries, and if it still can't start it shows a friendly Retry message instead of an error dialog. Includes everything from 1.15.0: the Academy payments desk (EFT/cash confirmations with stamped receipts from accounts@), fee filters and discounts, learner classes with group chats, class-aware scheduling, per-session materials and the separate Academy inbox.

updates.title: Academy: payments desk, classes & group chat
updates.notes: The Academy console grows up: EFT and cash payments learners request on the website now land in a pending queue — one click confirms the money, unlocks their month and emails a professional stamped receipt from accounts@canaanai.co.za. Fees get grade/class/month/status/method filters plus discounts per learner or for a whole grade's month. Group learners into classes (assign in bulk), schedule sessions per class, and chat with each class as a group or each learner privately — in a new Academy inbox kept separate from your business messages. Materials can now be pinned to a single session. Receipt and invoice previews gain LegalBill-style stamp options (PAID, RECEIVED, DUE, OVERDUE, DRAFT).

updates.title: Academy: multi-day series & Sunday
updates.notes: The Academy class-series generator now lets you pick multiple days of the week at once (e.g. Monday, Wednesday and Friday) and finally includes Sunday — one generation lays down every chosen day across your month range, all sharing the same time and venue (contact) or platform and join link (online). Pairs with the website update that lets learners edit their own school, grade and contact details.

updates.title: Academy: schools & class types
updates.notes: The Learners list now shows each learner's province and EMIS number (captured when they choose their school from the official register at sign-up). The weekly class-series generator now lets you pick the class type — Online (Teams/Zoom) or Contact (Mthatha, with a venue) — so a whole term of classes can be preloaded in one step.

updates.title: Canaan AI Academy console
updates.notes: Run your tuition business from the app. The new 🎓 Academy tab manages the Canaan AI Academy (Grade 10–12 IT Delphi tuition): every enrolled learner with school, grade and fees paid; one-click deactivate/reactivate; schedule sessions individually or generate a whole January–November weekly series; mark attendance; upload learning material and Delphi data files per grade; and manage monthly R600 fees — record EFT/cash payments or waive a month. Online tuition payments unlock classes automatically via the website.

updates.title: Trial licences in the Licences tab
updates.notes: Trial licences now show their key, bound email and device seat (trials are locked to 1 device / 1 email). Also fixes the phantom update banner from 1.13.1.

updates.title: GitHub-linked installers
updates.notes: Link a product straight to a GitHub releases repo from the Catalogue's ⇪ installer dialog (github:owner/repo) — the website then always serves customers your newest release automatically, with the version shown on the product card. No more manual installer uploads; single-file upload stays available too.

updates.title: Tier & seat licensing
updates.notes: Sell in tiers and enforce device seats. Licences you issue now carry their tier, seat allowance and the buyer's email, so LegalBill activates online on exactly the number of devices the plan allows. The Licences tab shows each licence's tier and how many device seats are used, with a Devices panel to release a seat when a firm changes machines. Receipts now email themselves automatically the moment an order is paid.

updates.title: Pricing tiers
updates.notes: Sell each product in tiers — for example LegalBill as Solo, Small Firm, Growing and Large. A new 💲 Tiers button in the Catalogue lets you add, edit and reorder tiers, each with its own price, an optional was-price for launch discounts, a 'most popular' highlight, a feature list, and a 'by quote' option that sends customers to the proposal flow. Customers choose a tier on the website, then order and pay for that price, and the tier they picked appears on their invoice and receipt.

updates.title: Payments: PayFast, EFT, invoices & receipts
updates.notes: Take money properly. Orders paid online with PayFast land in the Orders tab already marked paid (the website confirms the payment server-to-server, so a licence can never go out unpaid). EFT payments get a Mark paid dialog that records the amount, reference and date, and every order now carries a numbered invoice and receipt — preview them, print to PDF, or email them to the customer in one click with your company branding, banking details and VAT handling. The 🔑 Deliver step stays locked until the order is paid.

updates.title: Real LegalBill licensing
updates.notes: Licence generation now happens inside the app — no separate keygen needed. When you issue or deliver a LegalBill licence, Canaan AI generates the real LegalBill key itself (Professional, 5-year update entitlement). Once a customer submits the device code their installed app shows them, the app produces the matching device-locked activation code and sends it by message and optional email, so the licence only ever works on that one device. The Licences tab shows each device code and its activation code at a glance.

updates.title: Licensing & legal
updates.notes: Sell your software properly from the portal. New Licences tab: issue perpetual keys (locked to one device) and see every trial and licence at a glance — keys are messaged to the customer with an optional email, and delivering an order now issues the licence automatically. New Legal docs tab: upload your EULA and agreement PDFs per product and mark which must be signed before a customer can download or start a trial. Customers accept the agreements in their portal, view and download all their documents anytime, and you can see exactly who signed what.

updates.title: Live sync
updates.notes: The Client portal now updates itself automatically. New website orders, proposal requests and messages appear in the app within seconds — no need to click Refresh — and you get a notification the moment one arrives. Your cloud data also syncs quietly in the background while you work.

updates.title: Reliable updates
updates.notes: Fixes the update download that could freeze partway (for example, stuck at 66%). Updates now recover on their own: if the connection stalls, the download stops after 30 seconds and shows a Retry button, and retrying continues from where it left off instead of downloading the whole file again. Includes everything from v1.8.0 — the new Client portal for managing your customer website from inside the app.

updates.title: Client portal
updates.notes: Manage your new customer website straight from the app. The new Client portal section shows website orders (invoice them, mark paid, then deliver a licence key and installer download in one step), custom-system proposals you can read and quote, and a real-time chat with each customer — with an option to also send your reply by email. You also control the website catalogue and its sign-in-only prices from here. It connects through the same Supabase details as cloud sync, so set that up under Settings to switch it on.

updates.title: Ready-to-fill agreements
updates.notes: Create signed-ready contracts inside the app: pick a type — Service/Development, SLA, Software Licence, Maintenance, NDA or Support Retainer — fill only that type's fields, and get a branded multi-page agreement with your letterhead, tailored clauses, special conditions and signature blocks. Same preview, print, email and save buttons as invoices.

updates.title: Your logo everywhere
updates.notes: The real Canaan AI circuit-ring logo now appears on the login screen, the sidebar, and the app's window, taskbar and desktop icons — matching the letterhead on your documents.

updates.title: Microsoft 365 email that actually works
updates.notes: Microsoft retired password-based SMTP — that's why email refused to connect. The app now sends through Microsoft Graph, the modern supported way. One-time setup: register an app in your Microsoft admin portal and paste three values under Settings → Email, then hit Send test. Send-from aliases still work; plain SMTP remains for other providers.

updates.title: Company docs vault + your real brand on every document
updates.notes: New Company docs page — keep your CIPC registration, SARS tax papers, contract templates and brand files inside the app (open, save a copy, or email them). Every PDF letterhead now carries the Canaan AI navy/gold circuit logo with the motto 'Intelligent solutions for Africa and beyond'. Email signatures build automatically from your company profile, and the address moves to Mthatha.

updates.title: Real print dialog + send from aliases
updates.notes: Print now opens the print dialog immediately. Email lets you choose which of your addresses to send from (add your aliases under Settings → Email), guides you when email isn't configured yet, and explains Microsoft 365 errors in plain language. New Send test button in Settings → Email.

updates.title: Print, preview, send & save everywhere
updates.notes: Every invoice, quote, receipt, licence and client statement now has one-click buttons for Print preview, Print, Send by email, and Save as PDF — right on the row, no need to open the preview first.

updates.title: Settings buttons hotfix
updates.notes: Fixes buttons inside pages that did not respond — Configure SMTP, Edit company, Backup/Restore, Change PIN, Upload logo, Check for updates, and the empty-state and product-page buttons.

updates.title: GitHub integration
updates.notes: Connect your GitHub account (Settings → GitHub) to import your repositories as products — each one pulls in its versions (from your GitHub releases), README, language, and a Production or Development phase automatically. Open a product to read its README and manage licences. New: Issue & email a licence certificate to a customer in one click.

updates.title: Professional documents + auto-update
updates.notes: Business logo on every document, themed invoices/quotes/receipts, PAID/OVERDUE/DRAFT stamps, per-customer statements, product price list, print preview, SMTP email, and automatic in-app updates.
